videos.headline: Northern Arizona's Young trucks his way into end zone
videos.description: Northern Arizona RB Cory Young runs for the pylon and runs over Arizona defenders for the touchdown.

videos.headline: Arizona's reverse leads to 55-yard TD
videos.description: Tyrell Johnson on the reverse takes it all the way up the sideline for the Wildcats' touchdown.

videos.headline: Flannigan-Fowles with the diving INT for Arizona
videos.description: Arizona DB makes a diving interception off the pass from Northern Arizona QB Case Cookus

videos.headline: Dawkins scores on the QB keeper
videos.description: Arizona QB Brandon Dawkins fakes the reverse then runs in the touchdown himself.

videos.headline: Green rushes 37 yards for another Wildcat TD
videos.description: Arizona RB Zach Green takes the handoff up the middle and runs all the way to the end zone.

videos.headline: Arizona walk-on scores untouched
videos.description: Arizona walk-on RB Branden Leon goes untouched for his first career touchdown and a 55-21 Arizona lead.
